sections.body: PD↑ 또는 LGD↑면 fair spread↑. Premium payments는 survival until payment date에 conditional하고, protection payment는 marginal default probability에 의해 weight돼. Standard coupon과 market spread가 다르면 upfront payment로 zero value를 맞춰.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0303의 timeline은 survival-dependent premium leg와 default-date expected loss protection leg를 분리했고, N0304는 after-inception spread change value로 이어갔어.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Premium leg를 default 후에도 계속 지급

formulas: Fair CDS: PV(Premium leg) = PV(Protection leg)
Rough one-period: CDS spread ≈ PD × LGD

quiz.question: PD 상승의 전형적 CDS fair spread 영향은?
quiz.explanation: Expected protection loss가 커져.

quiz.question: Standard coupon이 market fair spread와 다르면?
quiz.explanation: PV difference를 upfront로 조정해.

losItems.label: LOS 27.d
losItems.title: Using CDS to manage exposure and express credit-curve views
losItems.losText: CDS로 credit exposure를 hedge하고, credit spread level 및 curve shape 변화에 대한 view를 표현하는 방법을 설명하라.
losItems.why: Long/short protection direction과 steepener/flattener maturity legs를 정확히 잡아야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: CDS로 credit exposure를 hedge하고, credit spread level 및 curve shape 변화에 대한 view를 표현하는 방법을 설명하라.

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Bond/loan credit exposure를 hedge하려면 protection을 buy해 spread widening/default loss를 상쇄할 수 있어. Naked CDS로 directional view도 가능해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: After inception protection buyer는 spread widening에 이익, seller는 tightening에 이익. Credit curve trade는 same reference entity의 short- and long-maturity CDS에 opposite positions를 두어 slope change를 trade해. Label보다 각 leg의 long/short protection을 확인해.

sections.title: 4. 계산·판단 workflow
bullets: Curve view: short vs long maturity legs

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0305의 close-up은 steepener/flattening 이름만 외우지 말고 어느 maturity protection을 buy/sell하는지 확인하라고 경고했어.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Curve steepener label만 보고 position 결정

formulas: Approx. CDS value change ≈ Spread duration × Δspread × Notional (sign by position)

quiz.question: Protection buyer는 after inception spread widening 시 일반적으로?
quiz.explanation: 더 높은 protection spread의 market value를 가진 계약이 돼.

quiz.question: Credit curve trade에서 가장 먼저 확인할 것은?
choices: 각 maturity leg의 buy/sell protection direction
quiz.explanation: Steepener/flattener는 leg construction으로 이해해야 해.

losItems.label: LOS 27.e
losItems.title: CDS relative-value and cross-market arbitrage
losItems.losText: Bonds, loans, equities, equity-linked instruments와 CDS 간 valuation disparities를 이용하는 relative-value/arbitrage trades를 설명하라.
losItems.why: 진짜 riskless arbitrage보다 basis/relative-value trade가 많고 funding·deliverability·liquidity risk를 이해해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: Bonds, loans, equities, equity-linked instruments와 CDS 간 valuation disparities를 이용하는 relative-value/arbitrage trades를 설명하라.

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Cash bond spread와 CDS spread가 inconsistent하면 long cheap/short rich credit exposure를 구성할 수 있어. Index CDS vs constituent single names, capital-structure instruments, synthetic vs cash CDO cost differences도 relative-value source가 돼.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Positive/negative basis trade에서는 bond funding cost, repo, accrued coupon, CDS premium, deliverability와 default settlement를 함께 봐야 해. LBO 같은 event는 equity와 credit protection value를 동시에 바꿔 capital-structure trades를 만들 수 있어.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0307은 synthetic CDO(SPV+CDS)와 cash CDO(loan pool purchase)를 나란히 그려 cost disparity가 있을 때만 arbitrage opportunity가 생긴다고 정리했어.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Bond spread와 CDS spread quote conventions 무시

formulas: Basis ≈ CDS spread − Cash bond spread (convention-dependent)

quiz.question: CDS-bond basis trade의 핵심은?
quiz.explanation: Cash와 derivative markets 간 relative mispricing을 trade해.

quiz.question: Basis trade가 완전 riskless가 아닌 이유로 가장 적절한 것은?
quiz.explanation: Implementation frictions와 basis widening risk가 있어.

readings.title: Pricing and Valuation of Forward Commitments
readings.sourceNote: 2026 Schweser R28 backbone + Marie note ledger N0308~N0333 integrated and independently rewritten.
readings.overview: Carry arbitrage에서 시작해 equity/fixed-income/interest-rate forwards, FRA, interest-rate swaps, currency swaps와 equity swaps를 하나의 no-arbitrage pricing framework로 연결한다.
readings.examPriority: 최상. Forward price vs value, dividends/coupons, FRA settlement discount, swap payer/receiver sign, FX quote convention이 핵심 함정이다.

losItems.label: LOS 28.a
losItems.title: Pricing and valuation of equity forwards and futures
losItems.losText: describe how equity forwards and futures are priced, and calculate and interpret their no-arbitrage value
losItems.why: Equity forward는 spot price에 financing cost와 dividends를 어떻게 반영하는지가 핵심이야. Inception price와 중간시점 contract value를 구분하지 못하면 거의 모든 계산이 꼬여.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe how equity forwards and futures are priced, and calculate and interpret their no-arbitrage value

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: 오늘 주식을 직접 사서 만기까지 들고 가는 전략과 오늘 forward로 미래 매입가격을 잠그는 전략이 경제적으로 같아야 해. Direct holding에서 받는 dividends는 forward buyer가 못 받으므로 fair forward price를 낮추는 요소가 돼.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: No-dividend equity는 spot을 risk-free rate로 carry한 future value가 fair delivery price야. Discrete dividend가 있으면 spot에서 PV(dividends)를 빼고 carry하고, continuous dividend yield q가 있으면 F0=S0e^{(r−q)T}. 중간시점 long-forward value는 현재 adjusted spot에서 original delivery price의 PV를 차감해 구해. Futures는 daily settlement 때문에 forward와 value dynamics가 다르지만 short horizon/uncorrelated rates에서는 prices가 유사할 수 있어.

sections.title: 4. 계산·판단 workflow
bullets: Valuation date t에서 remaining dividends만 PV 차감
K를 t→T 구간 risk-free rate로 discount
Long value sign 해석; short는 반대

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0308: Marie overview distinguishes derivative contracts from spot assets, forward commitments from contingent claims, contract price from contract value, and pricing from valuation. Forward commitments generally start at zero value, while later value can be posit... / N0310: No money changes hands at forward inception when the contract is fairly priced and value is zero. At later dates, positive value to one party equals negative value to the other in the simple bilateral setup; the winning party bears counterparty risk if the ... / N0311: Long forward agrees to buy/deliverable asset, short agrees to sell. No-arbitrage forward price prevents profitable riskless trading under assumptions such as low transaction costs, ability to short and borrow/lend. Forward contract price is delivery price f... / N0313: Discrete dividends: forward price can be computed from adjusted spot (S0−PV dividends) compounded to T, equivalently spot future value minus future value of interim dividends. Long-forward value after inception compares adjusted current spot with PV of orig...

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Continuous yield와 discrete cash dividend를 동시에 중복 반영
Futures daily MTM 효과를 무시하고 모든 상황에서 forward와 동일하다고 단정

formulas: Long value at t: Vt=[St−PVt(remaining income)]−PVt(K)

quiz.question: S0=100, r=5%, T=1, dividend 없음. Fair forward price는?
Long equity forward의 중간가치 계산에서 차감해야 할 것은?
choices: 남은 dividends의 PV와 original delivery price의 PV
quiz.explanation: Valuation date 이후 남은 income과 K의 PV를 반영해.

losItems.label: LOS 28.b
losItems.title: Carry arbitrage model with and without underlying cash flows
losItems.losText: describe the carry arbitrage model without underlying cashflows and with underlying cashflows
losItems.why: Fair forward price 공식을 외우는 대신 왜 cash-and-carry와 reverse cash-and-carry가 mispricing을 제거하는지 이해하는 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe the carry arbitrage model without underlying cashflows and with underlying cashflows

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Forward가 fair value보다 비싸면 spot을 사서 forward로 비싸게 팔고, fair value보다 싸면 spot을 short하고 forward로 싸게 사는 방향이 기본이야. Underlying cash flow는 spot holder가 받으므로 carry cost에서 차감돼.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: No-income asset의 fair forward price는 spot future value. Known income I가 있으면 spot에서 PV(I)를 차감한 net investment를 carry해. Storage cost가 있으면 cost를 더하고 benefits/income은 빼는 generalized carry logic으로 확장돼. Arbitrage profit은 initial borrowing, interim income, terminal delivery를 모두 맞춰야 해.

sections.title: 4. 계산·판단 workflow
bullets: Terminal net cash flow가 riskless인지 검증

losItems.label: LOS 28.c
losItems.title: Pricing and valuation of interest rate forwards and futures
losItems.losText: describe how interest rate forwards and futures are priced, and calculate and interpret their no-arbitrage value
losItems.why: FRA의 forward rate를 spot rates에서 만들고, settlement date에 future interest difference를 discount하는 흐름을 잡아야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe how interest rate forwards and futures are priced, and calculate and interpret their no-arbitrage value

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: 오늘 30일 투자 후 90일 더 투자하는 경로와 오늘부터 120일 투자하는 경로가 같도록 만드는 90-day future rate가 forward rate야. Borrower가 rates rising을 걱정하면 long FRA로 미래 borrowing rate를 잠가.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: FRA notation x×y는 contract settlement at x months와 underlying loan end at y months를 뜻해. Fair FRA rate는 zero/spot curve의 compounding identity에서 도출돼. Settlement는 underlying interest period 시작 시점에 이루어지므로 period-end interest difference를 settlement date로 discount한다. Interest-rate futures는 exchange-traded daily MTM와 quote conventions 때문에 convexity/settlement differences가 있을 수 있어.

sections.body: Forward full price는 current full price에서 delivery 전 coupons의 PV를 빼고 financing rate로 carry해. Quote가 clean이면 accrued interest를 분리해야 해. Treasury-style bond futures는 deliverable basket, conversion factor, accrued interest와 CTD option이 있어 quoted futures price를 해석할 때 단순 forward formula만으로 끝나지 않아.

losItems.label: LOS 28.e

losItems.losText: describe how interest rate swaps are priced, and calculate and interpret their no-arbitrage value

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Plain-vanilla swap은 fixed-rate bond leg와 floating-rate note leg의 교환으로 볼 수 있어. Inception에서는 fixed rate를 두 leg PV가 같아지도록 정해 swap value=0으로 만든다.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Discount factors로 par fixed rate를 구한다. Standard floating leg는 reset date 직후 par-like value를 갖는 성질을 이용할 수 있어. After inception, original fixed rate는 바뀌지 않고 current curve로 remaining fixed/floating legs를 revalue한다. Fixed payer는 market swap rates 상승 시 일반적으로 이익.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Valuation date에는 domestic leg와 foreign leg의 remaining cash flows를 각각 local discount factors로 PV한다. 그 후 current spot FX로 동일 currency 단위로 바꿔 receive leg minus pay leg를 계산한다. Principal exchange가 실제로 존재할 수 있다는 점이 plain IRS와 다르다.

losItems.losText: describe how equity swaps are priced, and calculate and interpret their no-arbitrage value
losItems.why: Equity total return leg와 fixed/floating financing leg를 PV difference로 보는 LOS야.

sections.body: describe how equity swaps are priced, and calculate and interpret their no-arbitrage value

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: 한 party는 stock/index total return을 지급하고 다른 party는 fixed 또는 floating return을 지급해. Investor는 cash equity를 직접 거래하지 않고 synthetic equity exposure를 얻거나 hedge할 수 있어.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Inception terms are set for zero value. After inception, equity leg depends on current index level plus dividends/total-return convention; fixed/floating leg는 remaining cash flows를 discount해 평가한다. Swap value는 receive leg PV minus pay leg PV. Equity return이 negative면 equity payer가 오히려 receiving cash flow를 가질 수 있어 netting convention을 봐야 해.

losItems.label: LOS 29.a
losItems.title: Binomial option valuation model and component terms
losItems.losText: describe and interpret the binomial option valuation model and its component terms
losItems.why: Option value를 replication과 risk-neutral probability 두 관점으로 연결하는 출발 LOS야. u, d, q, risk-free growth condition을 정확히 해석해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe and interpret the binomial option valuation model and its component terms

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: 한 기간 뒤 underlying price가 up 또는 down 두 상태 중 하나라고 단순화해. Option은 각 상태 payoff가 다르고, no-arbitrage는 같은 payoff를 복제하는 stock+borrowing portfolio와 같은 가격을 요구해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: S_u=S0u, S_d=S0d. No-arbitrage condition은 d<1+r<u. Risk-neutral probability q=[(1+r)−d]/(u−d)이며 실제 발생확률이 아니라 pricing weight야. Option value는 q-weighted expected payoff를 risk-free rate로 discount한다.

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Caplet/floorlet 같은 rate option은 future reference rate가 strike보다 높거나 낮을 때 payoff가 생겨. Rate tree의 terminal/settlement states에서 payoff를 계산하고 backward induction해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Caplet payoff at payment date는 N×Δ×max(R−K,0), floorlet은 N×Δ×max(K−R,0). Settlement timing에 따라 discount가 필요해. Interest-rate tree node probabilities와 discount rates를 consistent하게 사용해.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0334: Introduces binomial model inputs S0, up/down factors U/D and branch probabilities. Risk-neutral probability q=(1+Rf−D)/(U−D). Worked call example computes terminal payoffs max(S−X,0), expected payoff under risk-neutral q and discounts at risk-free rate. Mar... / N0336: Two-period recombining stock tree with terminal call payoffs. Option values are rolled backward node by node using risk-neutral expected value discounted at risk-free rate. Notes distinguish exercise/payoff at terminal nodes and continuation value at prior ... / N0337: Multiperiod tree compares continuation value with intrinsic/exercise value at each node for American options; European options cannot exercise early. Backward induction uses max(intrinsic, continuation) for American holder. Notes highlight early-exercise re... / N0341: Dense master note unifies one-period binomial tree, up/down factors, hedge ratio, replicating portfolio, risk-neutral probability, discounted expected payoff and put-call parity. Includes conditions D<1+Rf<U and arbitrage implications.

bullets: Rate quote와 bond price direction 혼동

quiz.question: Caplet은 언제 positive payoff?
quiz.explanation: Rate cap의 call-like payoff.

quiz.question: Notional과 accrual factor를 왜 곱하나?
quiz.explanation: Rate difference를 period interest cash flow로 바꿔.

losItems.label: LOS 29.f
losItems.title: Assumptions of the Black–Scholes–Merton model
losItems.losText: identify assumptions of the Black–Scholes–Merton option valuation model
losItems.why: Formula 암기보다 assumptions 위반이 model risk와 hedging error를 만드는 이유를 이해해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: identify assumptions of the Black–Scholes–Merton option valuation model

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: BSM은 continuous trading과 lognormal underlying dynamics 아래 dynamic replication이 가능하다고 가정해. Basic model은 European exercise, known constant volatility와 risk-free rate, frictionless markets 등을 둬.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Underlying follows geometric Brownian motion: continuous price paths, constant σ, lognormal terminal price. No arbitrage, continuous trading, no transaction costs/taxes, borrowing/lending at risk-free rate, short selling. Dividend yield extension은 q로 반영 가능.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0339: Marie note states European parity C+PV(X)=P+S for non-dividend stock and rearranges synthetic stock, bond, call and put positions. Includes arbitrage logic when observed prices violate parity and payoff diagrams. Dividend adjustment is preserved where relev... / N0341: Dense master note unifies one-period binomial tree, up/down factors, hedge ratio, replicating portfolio, risk-neutral probability, discounted expected payoff and put-call parity. Includes conditions D<1+Rf<U and arbitrage implications.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Continuous hedging 가능성을 현실 보장으로 해석

formulas: dS/S=(μdt+σdW) under real-world; pricing uses risk-neutral drift r−q

quiz.question: Basic BSM의 대표 assumption은?
quiz.explanation: Basic closed-form model은 constant σ를 가정.

quiz.question: Underlying terminal price distribution은?
quiz.explanation: Log price가 normal이라 price는 lognormal.

losItems.label: LOS 29.g
losItems.title: BSM call as a leveraged position in the underlying
losItems.losText: interpret the components of the Black–Scholes–Merton model as applied to call options in terms of a leveraged position in the underlying
losItems.why: Call value를 단순 두 항의 공식이 아니라 delta shares financed by borrowing이라는 replication 관점으로 읽는 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: interpret the components of the Black–Scholes–Merton model as applied to call options in terms of a leveraged position in the underlying

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Call은 underlying 일부를 보유하고 exercise price 관련 present-value amount를 borrowing한 leveraged position으로 해석할 수 있어.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Non-dividend call C=S0N(d1)−Xe^{-rT}N(d2). 첫 항은 delta-weighted stock exposure, 둘째 항은 state-contingent exercise financing의 PV 성격. Dividend yield가 있으면 S0e^{-qT}N(d1). N(d1)과 N(d2)를 같은 probability로 단순 해석하지 않아.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0339: Marie note states European parity C+PV(X)=P+S for non-dividend stock and rearranges synthetic stock, bond, call and put positions. Includes arbitrage logic when observed prices violate parity and payoff diagrams. Dividend adjustment is preserved where relev...

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: 두 항을 independent assets로 과도 해석

quiz.question: BSM call의 첫 항 S e^{-qT}N(d1)은 주로?
quiz.explanation: Replicating stock exposure를 나타내.

quiz.question: N(d2)는?
quiz.explanation: Pricing measure 아래 exercise probability와 연결.

losItems.label: LOS 29.h
losItems.title: BSM valuation of European equity and currency options
losItems.losText: describe how the Black–Scholes–Merton model is used to value European options on equities and currencies
losItems.why: Equity dividend yield q와 foreign risk-free rate를 동일한 carry-yield 역할로 연결하는 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe how the Black–Scholes–Merton model is used to value European options on equities and currencies

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Dividend-paying stock option은 underlying carry benefit q 때문에 spot term에 e^{-qT}를 붙여. Currency option에서는 foreign currency가 foreign risk-free yield를 주는 asset처럼 작동해 q=r_f로 대체할 수 있어.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Equity call/put formulas use S0e^{-qT}. FX call on foreign currency in domestic currency uses domestic discount r_d and foreign yield r_f: C=S0e^{-r_fT}N(d1)−Xe^{-r_dT}N(d2). Put formula similarly follows parity.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0342: Introduces BSM European option formula, d1/d2 and standard-normal cumulative probabilities. Assumptions include lognormal underlying, continuous trading, known constant risk-free rate/volatility in the basic model, frictionless markets and European exercise... / N0343: Close-up red note writes call/put BSM formulas, d1/d2 and dividend-yield variants. Interprets N(d2) as risk-neutral exercise-related probability and N(d1) in delta/hedge terms; preserves present-value strike component and parity link. / N0344: Near-identical alternate capture of the same red handwritten BSM formula note integrated in N0343. Meaning preserved through N0343. / N0357: Basic BSM assumes continuous price evolution, so sudden jumps create gamma risk for delta hedges. Future volatility is unobservable model input; historical estimates may be poor forecasts. Implied volatility is inferred from market price using other inputs ...

quiz.question: FX option에서 foreign risk-free rate의 역할은?
quiz.explanation: Foreign currency를 보유하면 foreign rate를 earn.

quiz.question: Dividend yield 상승의 call value 전형적 영향은?
quiz.explanation: Underlying carry benefit을 option holder가 놓치므로 call에 불리.

losItems.label: LOS 29.i
losItems.title: Black model for European options on futures
losItems.losText: describe how the Black model is used to value European options on futures
losItems.why: Underlying spot 대신 current futures price를 넣고 전체 expected payoff를 discount하는 구조가 핵심이야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe how the Black model is used to value European options on futures

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Futures contract는 inception value가 zero에 가깝고 daily settlement structure를 가지므로 Black model은 lognormal futures price를 underlying으로 둬 European futures option을 price해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Call c=e^{-rT}[F0N(d1)−XN(d2)], put=e^{-rT}[XN(−d2)−F0N(−d1)]. d1=[ln(F0/X)+0.5σ²T]/(σ√T), d2=d1−σ√T. Spot carry inputs는 이미 futures price에 반영돼.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0342: Introduces BSM European option formula, d1/d2 and standard-normal cumulative probabilities. Assumptions include lognormal underlying, continuous trading, known constant risk-free rate/volatility in the basic model, frictionless markets and European exercise... / N0343: Close-up red note writes call/put BSM formulas, d1/d2 and dividend-yield variants. Interprets N(d2) as risk-neutral exercise-related probability and N(d1) in delta/hedge terms; preserves present-value strike component and parity link. / N0344: Near-identical alternate capture of the same red handwritten BSM formula note integrated in N0343. Meaning preserved through N0343.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Option expiry와 futures maturity mismatch 무시

quiz.question: Black futures-option formula의 underlying input은?
quiz.explanation: F0를 사용해.

quiz.question: Formula 전체에 e^{-rT}가 붙는 이유는?
quiz.explanation: Future payoff PV를 구해.

losItems.label: LOS 29.j
losItems.title: Black model for European interest-rate options and swaptions
losItems.losText: describe how the Black model is used to value European interest rate options and European swaptions
losItems.why: Forward rate를 underlying으로 쓰고 accrual/discount factor 또는 swap annuity를 monetary multiplier로 붙이는 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe how the Black model is used to value European interest rate options and European swaptions

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Caplet은 future reference rate에 대한 call-like option, floorlet은 put-like option. Payer swaption은 future swap fixed rate가 strike보다 높을 때 유리한 call-like right, receiver swaption은 put-like야.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Black-76 style rate option은 forward rate F, strike K, σ, T를 쓰고 discount×notional×accrual factor를 곱해. Swaption은 underlying forward swap rate와 swap annuity PVBP를 multiplier로 사용해.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0345: Shows call/put value dependence on stock price, strike, volatility, time, rates and dividends, with BSM/normal-distribution intuition. Includes intrinsic versus time value and sensitivity graphs. Serves as bridge into delta and other Greeks. / N0346: Defines call intrinsic max(0,S−X), put intrinsic max(0,X−S), option value = intrinsic value + time value, and ITM/ATM/OTM classification. Notes value at expiry equals intrinsic value and time value decays toward zero. / N0347: Lists lower/upper bounds and comparative statics for call and put values. Higher volatility increases both call and put; stock-price, strike, rate, dividends and time have direction-specific effects. Notes distinguish American/European bounds and no-arbitra...

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Normal vs lognormal quote convention 혼동

quiz.question: Payer swaption은 어떤 rate view에 유리?
quiz.explanation: Higher market swap rate에서 low strike pay-fixed right가 가치 있어.

quiz.question: Swaption formula multiplier로 중요한 것은?
quiz.explanation: Underlying swap fixed-leg PVBP/annuity를 곱해.

losItems.label: LOS 29.k
losItems.title: Interpretation of option Greeks
losItems.losText: interpret each of the option Greeks
losItems.why: Delta만이 아니라 gamma, vega, theta, rho를 risk dimensions로 구분하는 핵심 risk-management LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: interpret each of the option Greeks

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Greek은 option value가 한 input에 locally 얼마나 민감한지 보여줘. Delta는 first-order price exposure, gamma는 delta curvature, vega는 volatility, theta는 time passage, rho는 rates야.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Long call delta positive, long put delta negative. Long vanilla options gamma/vega generally positive. Theta는 대체로 negative지만 exceptions 가능. Call rho positive, put rho negative in standard equity setting. Greeks는 state-dependent하고 서로 상호작용해.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0345: Shows call/put value dependence on stock price, strike, volatility, time, rates and dividends, with BSM/normal-distribution intuition. Includes intrinsic versus time value and sensitivity graphs. Serves as bridge into delta and other Greeks. / N0347: Lists lower/upper bounds and comparative statics for call and put values. Higher volatility increases both call and put; stock-price, strike, rate, dividends and time have direction-specific effects. Notes distinguish American/European bounds and no-arbitra... / N0348: Marie note shows delta as slope of option-price curve, call delta positive and put delta negative, ATM sensitivity, and delta-hedge share/option ratios. Includes dividend-yield delta variants and local approximation ΔOption≈Delta×ΔS. / N0353: Delta = ∂C/∂S. For dividend yield δ, call delta=e^(−δT)N(d1), put delta=−e^(−δT)N(−d1). Call delta rises from near zero OTM toward one ITM; put delta negative. Option-price curve slope interpretation and local price-change approximation are included.

quiz.question: Long vanilla call의 gamma는 일반적으로?
quiz.explanation: Convex payoff라 positive gamma.

quiz.question: Vega는 무엇에 대한 sensitivity?
quiz.explanation: Option value의 σ 변화 민감도.

losItems.label: LOS 29.l
losItems.title: Executing a delta hedge
losItems.losText: describe how a delta hedge is executed
losItems.why: Option position의 local underlying sensitivity를 반대 stock/futures position으로 상쇄하고 dynamic rebalance하는 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe how a delta hedge is executed

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Short calls는 positive stock delta exposure를 반대로 hedge해야 하고, long calls는 underlying을 short해 delta-neutral을 만들 수 있어. 필요한 shares는 option units×delta를 기준으로 계산해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Portfolio delta=Σ position quantity×instrument delta. Set to zero by trading underlying with delta≈1 per share. Delta changes with S, time, volatility, so hedge는 dynamic. Dividends, transaction costs, discrete rebalancing과 gamma risk가 residual risk를 만든다.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0348: Marie note shows delta as slope of option-price curve, call delta positive and put delta negative, ATM sensitivity, and delta-hedge share/option ratios. Includes dividend-yield delta variants and local approximation ΔOption≈Delta×ΔS. / N0349: Worked notes construct delta-neutral portfolios with stock and options, calculate number of options/shares required and show why hedge must be dynamically rebalanced as delta changes. Highlights transaction-cost and jump/gamma risk. / N0353: Delta = ∂C/∂S. For dividend yield δ, call delta=e^(−δT)N(d1), put delta=−e^(−δT)N(−d1). Call delta rises from near zero OTM toward one ITM; put delta negative. Option-price curve slope interpretation and local price-change approximation are included. / N0354: Gamma=second derivative of option value with respect to underlying and measures delta change; long calls/puts positive gamma, largest near ATM/expiry. Vega measures sensitivity to volatility; long calls/puts positive vega and sensitivity often higher for lo...

quiz.question: Portfolio delta +250 shares equivalent면 hedge는?
quiz.explanation: Underlying delta≈1이므로 −250.

quiz.question: Delta hedge가 지속적으로 재조정되는 이유는?
quiz.explanation: Dynamic hedge가 필요해.

losItems.label: LOS 29.m
losItems.title: Role of gamma risk in options trading
losItems.losText: describe the role of gamma risk in options trading
losItems.why: Delta-neutral portfolio도 large move에서 손실할 수 있는 이유를 설명하는 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe the role of gamma risk in options trading

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Gamma는 underlying이 움직일 때 delta가 얼마나 빨리 변하는지 보여줘. Short option/short gamma position은 작은 premium carry를 벌다가 큰 moves에 hedge가 뒤처져 손실할 수 있어.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Positive gamma position은 convexity를 가져 large up/down move에서 유리하고 frequent delta rebalancing으로 buy low/sell high 효과가 가능하지만 theta cost가 있어. Negative gamma는 opposite. Gamma는 ATM and near expiry에서 커질 수 있어.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0350: Introduces interest-rate caplets/floorlets and swaptions. Cap protects floating-rate borrower from rates above strike; floor protects investor/lender from rates below strike. Payer swaption gives right to enter pay-fixed/receive-floating swap; receiver swap... / N0351: Marie map links long cap to protection against rate increases and long floor to protection against rate decreases, with cap-floor parity and fixed-rate instrument replication. Swaption map distinguishes payer versus receiver rights and when each is valuable. / N0356: Implied volatility is backed out from observed option market price given other model inputs and can differ from historical volatility. Notes show a delta-neutral short-call hedge can still have negative gamma and fail for large moves/jumps; continuous rebal... / N0357: Basic BSM assumes continuous price evolution, so sudden jumps create gamma risk for delta hedges. Future volatility is unobservable model input; historical estimates may be poor forecasts. Implied volatility is inferred from market price using other inputs ...

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Gamma를 option price sensitivity to volatility로 혼동

quiz.question: Delta-neutral short-gamma portfolio의 주요 위험은?
quiz.explanation: Delta가 빠르게 변해 hedge가 무너질 수 있어.

quiz.question: Gamma가 큰 구간으로 흔한 것은?
quiz.explanation: Curvature가 집중될 수 있어.

losItems.label: LOS 29.n
losItems.title: Implied volatility and its use in options trading
losItems.losText: define implied volatility and explain how it is used in options trading
losItems.why: Observed option price에서 역산한 market-consistent σ라는 점과 historical/future volatility 차이를 구분해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: define implied volatility and explain how it is used in options trading

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Option market price와 other inputs S,X,T,r,q가 주어졌을 때 pricing model을 거꾸로 풀어 얻은 σ가 implied volatility야. 시장의 가격 language이자 relative-value metric으로 쓰여.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: IV는 직접 forecast가 아니라 model-dependent price transformation. Strikes/maturities별 IV가 달라 smile/skew/surface를 만들며 traders는 realized volatility expectation, event risk, supply-demand와 비교해 long/short vol decisions를 해. Vega가 큰 options는 IV 변화에 더 민감해.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0350: Introduces interest-rate caplets/floorlets and swaptions. Cap protects floating-rate borrower from rates above strike; floor protects investor/lender from rates below strike. Payer swaption gives right to enter pay-fixed/receive-floating swap; receiver swap... / N0351: Marie map links long cap to protection against rate increases and long floor to protection against rate decreases, with cap-floor parity and fixed-rate instrument replication. Swaption map distinguishes payer versus receiver rights and when each is valuable. / N0352: Handwritten note compares underlying market swap rate with exercise fixed rate to determine payer/receiver swaption moneyness. Connects option value to annuity/DF factor and Black-style rate-option intuition, with payoff diagrams.

formulas: Find σ_imp such that ModelPrice(σ_imp)=Observed Market Price

quiz.question: Implied volatility는 무엇에서 역산?
quiz.explanation: Model price를 market price에 맞추는 σ.

quiz.question: IV와 future realized vol의 관계는?
quiz.explanation: IV는 risk premium/supply-demand도 반영하는 model-dependent metric.

readings.title: Introduction to Commodities and Commodity Derivatives
readings.sourceNote: 2026 Schweser R30 backbone + Marie note ledger N0361~N0367, N0369 integrated. LOS 30.h-30.j direct note gaps were independently filled from the 2026 backbone.
readings.overview: Commodity sector physical economics에서 시작해 life cycle, valuation difference, futures participants, contango/backwardation, return theories, fully collateralized return, swaps와 index construction까지 연결한다.
readings.examPriority: 높음. Carry relation과 expected return을 혼동하지 말고, roll return과 total return, index methodology 차이를 구분해야 한다.

losItems.label: LOS 30.a
losItems.title: Characteristics of commodity sectors
losItems.losText: compare characteristics of commodity sectors
losItems.why: Energy, metals, agriculture, livestock, precious metals처럼 sector별 physical economics가 완전히 달라서 동일한 valuation/term-structure intuition을 적용하면 안 돼.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: compare characteristics of commodity sectors

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Commodity는 기업처럼 하나의 business model이 아니라 생산기술, storability, seasonality, geography, regulation과 inventory economics가 price behavior를 결정해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Energy는 extraction/refining/transport constraints와 geopolitics가 크고, industrial metals는 global capex/manufacturing cycle, grains/softs는 weather and harvest season, livestock는 biological production cycle, precious metals는 monetary/store-of-value demand 비중이 커. Storability가 낮거나 production response가 느리면 shocks가 더 큰 price moves를 만들 수 있어.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합

Introduces producers, consumers, hedgers, speculators and arbitrageurs and w...

quiz.explanation: Gold 등은 investment demand가 중요.

losItems.label: LOS 30.b
losItems.title: Commodity sector life cycles from production to consumption
losItems.losText: compare the life cycle of commodity sectors from production through trading or consumption
losItems.why: 생산 lead time, processing, storage, transport, consumption timing이 futures curve와 shock persistence를 만든다는 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: compare the life cycle of commodity sectors from production through trading or consumption

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Oil well, copper mine, corn harvest, cattle herd는 supply를 늘리는 시간과 process가 다르다. 그래서 같은 demand shock에도 price path가 달라.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Commodity life cycle은 exploration/planting→production/extraction→processing/refining→transport/storage→wholesale trading→final consumption으로 볼 수 있어. Energy와 metals는 capital-intensive long lead times, crops는 seasonal harvest, livestock는 breeding cycle, electricity 같은 non-storable products는 immediate balancing이 중요해.

quiz.question: Long mine-development lead time의 의미는?
quiz.explanation: Capacity response가 느려.

quiz.question: Perishable commodity의 특징은?
quiz.explanation: 재고 carry가 어렵다.

losItems.label: LOS 30.c
losItems.title: Valuation of commodities versus equities and bonds
losItems.losText: contrast the valuation of commodities with the valuation of equities and bonds
losItems.why: Commodity는 claims on future cash flows가 아니라 consumable physical assets라 DCF 중심 valuation이 직접 적용되지 않는다는 핵심이야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: contrast the valuation of commodities with the valuation of equities and bonds

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Equity는 residual cash flows, bond는 contractual cash flows를 discount해 intrinsic value를 추정할 수 있어. Commodity 자체는 coupon/dividend를 만들지 않고 utility from consumption, scarcity, inventory and convenience를 제공해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Commodity value는 current/future supply-demand, marginal cost, inventories, storage, financing cost와 convenience yield에 의해 형성돼. Futures price는 cost-of-carry relation으로 spot과 연결되지만 expected return은 risk premia/hedging pressure 때문에 단순 carry formula와 다를 수 있어.

sections.title: 4. 계산·판단 workflow
bullets: Risk premium separate from pricing identity

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0362: Covers industrial metals, grains, livestock, precious metals and soft commodities with sector-specific supply/demand, inventory, weather, geopolitical and production-cycle drivers. Introduces producers, consumers, hedgers, speculators and arbitrageurs and w... / N0363: Links spot/futures through cost of carry, storage cost and convenience yield and introduces basis/calendar spread. Notes regulatory/market structure and derivative uses for hedging/speculation. Sets up contango/backwardation and commodity-futures-return the...

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Marginal production cost가 short-run price floor를 항상 보장

formulas: Generalized carry: F0≈S0e^{(r+storage cost yield−convenience yield)T}

quiz.question: Commodity와 equity valuation 차이의 핵심은?
choices: Commodity 자체는 contractual/residual CF claim이 아님
quiz.explanation: Physical consumption/inventory economics가 핵심.

quiz.question: Convenience yield는?
quiz.explanation: Shortage 대응 등 physical inventory benefit.

losItems.label: LOS 30.d
losItems.title: Participants in commodity futures markets
losItems.losText: describe types of participants in commodity futures markets
losItems.why: Producer/consumer hedgers와 speculators, arbitrageurs의 motives를 구분해야 hedging-pressure theory가 이해돼.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe types of participants in commodity futures markets

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Producer는 future selling price를 잠그기 위해 short hedge, consumer는 future input buying price를 잠그기 위해 long hedge하는 경향이 있어. Speculator는 price/risk-premium view를, arbitrageur는 relative mispricing을 trade해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Commercial hedgers는 physical exposure를 줄이고, noncommercial speculators는 risk-bearing capital을 제공할 수 있어. Index investors, swap dealers, merchants, processors, storage operators도 중요한 intermediaries야. 포지션 방향은 exposure에 따라 달라 절대적이지 않아.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0363: Links spot/futures through cost of carry, storage cost and convenience yield and introduces basis/calendar spread. Notes regulatory/market structure and derivative uses for hedging/speculation. Sets up contango/backwardation and commodity-futures-return the...

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Producer=always short, consumer=always long을 absolute rule

formulas: Producer long physical inventory often hedges with short futures
Future consumer short physical need often hedges with long futures

quiz.question: Oil producer가 future selling price 하락을 걱정하면 전형적으로?
quiz.explanation: Long physical exposure를 short futures로 hedge.

quiz.question: Airline이 jet fuel cost 상승을 걱정하면?
quiz.explanation: Future purchase exposure를 long derivatives로 hedge.

losItems.label: LOS 30.e
losItems.title: Spot–futures relationship in contango and backwardation
losItems.losText: analyze the relationship between spot prices and futures prices in markets in contango and markets in backwardation
losItems.why: Curve label, convergence, carry components를 분리해야 해. Contango/backwardation은 미래 return을 자동 보장하지 않아.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: analyze the relationship between spot prices and futures prices in markets in contango and markets in backwardation

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Contango는 farther futures가 near/spot보다 높은 upward-sloping structure, backwardation은 반대 downward-sloping structure를 뜻해. Maturity가 가까워지면 futures price는 spot으로 converge해야 해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Cost-of-carry 관점에서 financing/storage costs는 futures를 spot보다 높이는 압력, convenience yield는 낮추는 압력이야. Curve shape는 inventory tightness, seasonality, expected supply-demand와 risk premia를 함께 반영해. Spot과 futures의 relation은 quote date의 term structure이지 future spot forecast와 동일하지 않아.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0363: Links spot/futures through cost of carry, storage cost and convenience yield and introduces basis/calendar spread. Notes regulatory/market structure and derivative uses for hedging/speculation. Sets up contango/backwardation and commodity-futures-return the... / N0364: Basis=spot−futures; calendar spread compares near and distant futures. Contango generally S<F and negative roll yield; backwardation S>F and positive roll yield in the simplified rolling setup. Covers insurance/normal-backwardation theory, hedging-pressure ... / N0367: Close-up emphasizes futures converges to spot at maturity but roll yield depends on repeated replacement of expiring contracts and curve shape, not simply spot-price change. Distinguishes positive/negative roll in backwardation/contango under unchanged curv... / N0369: Inserted Marie note compares spot/futures convergence under contango and backwardation and maps long roll return sign. Retained under R30 despite appearing beside the real-estate transition page.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Curve slope와 expected future spot 동일시

quiz.question: Contango의 일반적 curve shape는?
quiz.explanation: Upward-sloping term structure.

quiz.question: Futures expiry 시 핵심 관계는?
quiz.explanation: Delivery/arbitrage forces convergence.

losItems.label: LOS 30.f
losItems.title: Theories of commodity futures returns
losItems.losText: compare theories of commodity futures returns
losItems.why: Normal backwardation, hedging pressure, storage theory가 서로 다른 질문을 설명한다는 걸 구분해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: compare theories of commodity futures returns

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Futures return은 단순 expected spot movement만이 아니라 누가 risk를 hedge하고 누가 risk premium을 받는지, inventory scarcity가 어떤 convenience benefit을 만드는지에 달려.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Insurance/normal-backwardation view는 net short hedgers가 speculators에게 risk premium을 제공해 futures below expected future spot 가능성을 설명해. Hedging-pressure theory는 producer/consumer 어느 쪽 net pressure가 큰지에 따라 premium sign이 달라질 수 있어. Theory of storage는 spot-futures spread를 financing, storage cost, convenience yield로 설명해.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0364: Basis=spot−futures; calendar spread compares near and distant futures. Contango generally S<F and negative roll yield; backwardation S>F and positive roll yield in the simplified rolling setup. Covers insurance/normal-backwardation theory, hedging-pressure ... / N0365: Annotated page reinforces normal backwardation, hedging pressure and storage/convenience-yield theory. Handwritten examples distinguish producer short-hedging pressure from consumer long-hedging pressure and warn contango/backwardation are not determined by...

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Backwardation을 모든 theory에서 same reason으로 설명
Storage theory를 expected return theory와 동일시

formulas: Storage relation: F−S reflects financing + storage − convenience (appropriately compounded)
Risk premium intuition: Expected future spot − current futures may compensate futures position

quiz.question: Net producer short hedging pressure가 큰 상황에서 speculator long이 받을 수 있는 것은?
quiz.explanation: Insurance/hedging-pressure intuition.

quiz.question: Theory of storage가 집중하는 것은?
quiz.explanation: Carry와 convenience yield를 설명해.

losItems.label: LOS 30.g
losItems.title: Total return of a fully collateralized commodity futures position
losItems.losText: describe, calculate, and interpret the components of total return for a fully collateralized commodity futures contract
losItems.why: Commodity index return을 spot/price, roll, collateral return으로 분해하는 계산 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe, calculate, and interpret the components of total return for a fully collateralized commodity futures contract

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Futures notional 전체만큼 collateral를 안전자산에 두고 contract를 rolling한다고 생각해. 총수익은 underlying futures/spot movement, expiring contract를 next contract로 갈아타는 roll effect, collateral interest를 합쳐.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Common decomposition: total return ≈ spot/price return + roll return + collateral return. Definitions vary by index methodology, so exam convention을 따라. Futures itself requires low initial capital but fully collateralized return assumes cash collateral earns interest.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0366: Marie note decomposes commodity futures total return into spot/price return, roll return and collateral return. Rolling in backwardation can create positive roll yield; rolling in contango negative roll yield, subject to curve movements. Preserves futures-p... / N0367: Close-up emphasizes futures converges to spot at maturity but roll yield depends on repeated replacement of expiring contracts and curve shape, not simply spot-price change. Distinguishes positive/negative roll in backwardation/contango under unchanged curv... / N0369: Inserted Marie note compares spot/futures convergence under contango and backwardation and maps long roll return sign. Retained under R30 despite appearing beside the real-estate transition page.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Margin만 투자한 leveraged return과 fully collateralized return 혼동

formulas: Total return ≈ Price/spot return + Roll return + Collateral return

quiz.question: Fully collateralized futures total return component가 아닌 것은?
quiz.explanation: Commodity futures decomposition과 무관.

quiz.question: Collateral return의 source는?
quiz.explanation: Notional backing cash의 yield.

losItems.label: LOS 30.h
losItems.title: Roll return in contango versus backwardation
losItems.losText: contrast roll return in markets in contango and markets in backwardation
losItems.why: 이 LOS는 509장 필기에 직접 매핑이 없어서 2026 Schweser backbone으로 보강했어. Curve unchanged 가정 아래 roll mechanics를 정확히 설명해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: contrast roll return in markets in contango and markets in backwardation

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Long investor는 expiring near contract를 close하고 farther contract를 buy해. Backwardation에서는 farther contract가 더 싸서 같은 notional로 favorable roll, contango에서는 더 비싼 farther contract를 사 negative roll pressure가 생길 수 있어.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Roll return은 spot-price change와 별개이며 curve가 time over unchanged하다는 simplified intuition에서 backwardation positive, contango negative. 실제 realized roll은 curve shifts, contract selection, roll schedule, collateral and transaction costs에 달려.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: 이 LOS에는 직접 대응하는 필기 이미지가 없어 2026 Schweser backbone을 기준으로 독립 재구성했어.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Roll return을 futures convergence return과 중복

formulas: Simplified long roll return depends on change from old contract to new contract price under index convention

quiz.question: Unchanged backwardated curve에서 long roll의 전형적 sign은?
quiz.explanation: Cheaper deferred contract로 roll하는 favorable effect 가능.

quiz.question: Contango의 negative roll return이 의미하지 않는 것은?
quiz.explanation: Spot can rise while roll is negative.

losItems.label: LOS 30.i
losItems.title: Commodity swaps for obtaining or modifying exposure
losItems.losText: describe how commodity swaps are used to obtain or modify exposure to commodities
losItems.why: 직접 physical commodity를 보유하지 않고 fixed/floating commodity price exposure를 교환하는 구조를 이해해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe how commodity swaps are used to obtain or modify exposure to commodities

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Consumer는 future input cost를 fixed하려고 pay fixed/receive floating? 실제 cash-flow convention에 따라 floating commodity payment와 fixed payment를 교환해 net exposure를 설계해. Producer는 opposite hedge를 원할 수 있어.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Fixed-for-floating commodity swap은 reference commodity price/index average와 fixed price 차이를 notional quantity에 적용해 settle해. Basis swap은 two commodity grades/locations/indexes의 spread exposure를 바꿀 수 있고, total-return swap 형태도 가능해. Credit/counterparty and basis risk가 남아.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: 이 LOS에는 직접 대응하는 필기 이미지가 없어 2026 Schweser backbone을 기준으로 독립 재구성했어.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Pay fixed/receive floating direction을 exposure 없이 암기

formulas: Settlement ≈ Quantity × (Floating reference price − Fixed price), sign by position

quiz.question: Commodity consumer가 price 상승을 hedge하려면 어떤 경제적 exposure를 원하나?
choices: Floating price 상승 시 derivative gain
quiz.explanation: Physical purchase cost 상승을 offset해야 해.

quiz.question: Commodity basis swap의 목적은?
choices: Two reference prices/spreads 간 exposure 변환
quiz.explanation: Grade/location/index basis risk를 바꿔.

losItems.label: LOS 30.j
losItems.title: Commodity index construction and return effects
losItems.losText: describe how the construction of commodity indexes affects index returns
losItems.why: 이 LOS도 직접 필기 매핑이 없어서 2026 backbone으로 보강했어. 같은 commodities라도 selection, weights, contract/roll rules 때문에 return이 크게 달라질 수 있어.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe how the construction of commodity indexes affects index returns

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Commodity index는 physical basket을 들고 있는 게 아니라 futures positions를 규칙에 따라 선택·weight·roll하는 경우가 많아. 그래서 index design 자체가 return source야.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Key choices: eligible sectors/contracts, production or liquidity weights, caps, front-month vs deferred contracts, roll window, dynamic contract selection, rebalancing, collateral treatment. Front-month constant-maturity approaches는 contango/backwardation exposure가 다르고, concentration/sector weights도 risk를 바꿔.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: 이 LOS에는 직접 대응하는 필기 이미지가 없어 2026 Schweser backbone을 기준으로 독립 재구성했어.

formulas: Index total return depends on constituent price moves + contract-selection/roll + collateral conventions

quiz.question: 같은 commodity basket의 두 indexes가 다른 return을 낼 수 있는 이유는?
quiz.explanation: Index construction이 return을 바꿔.

quiz.question: Front-month index의 특징은?
quiz.explanation: Curve shape에 roll exposure가 커질 수 있어.

readings.title: Overview of Types of Real Estate Investment
readings.sourceNote: 2026 Schweser R31 backbone + Marie note ledger N0368, N0370~N0391 integrated and independently rewritten.
readings.overview: Real estate의 valuation features와 economic drivers에서 시작해 property-type differences, due diligence, cost/sales/income valuation approaches와 index biases까지 연결한다.
readings.examPriority: 높음. NOI 정의, cap rate, property-type cash-flow differences, appraisal smoothing과 due-diligence traps가 중요하다.

losItems.label: LOS 31.a
losItems.title: Real estate investment features for valuation
losItems.losText: compare important real estate investment features for valuation purposes
losItems.why: Real estate는 heterogeneity, location, illiquidity, leverage, lease structure 때문에 listed securities와 같은 one-size-fits-all valuation이 안 돼.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: compare important real estate investment features for valuation purposes

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: 같은 면적의 건물도 location, tenant quality, lease terms, age와 management에 따라 CF와 cap rate가 달라. 거래가 드물고 asset가 indivisible해서 observed market price도 noisy해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Valuation-relevant features include heterogeneity, fixed location, long economic life but depreciation/obsolescence, high transaction costs, limited liquidity, large ticket size, active management, lease contracts, leverage and market segmentation. Private appraisal values may lag public market changes.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0368: Introduces real estate as heterogeneous, local, indivisible, management-intensive, illiquid and transaction-costly with depreciation/obsolescence and difficult price discovery. Explains direct versus indirect, public versus private and debt versus equity ex... / N0370: Reasons include current income, capital appreciation, inflation hedge, diversification and tax benefits. Discusses low/moderate correlation with traditional assets, possible inflation sensitivity and return drivers. Also introduces key disadvantages/risks s... / N0372: Matrix classifies private/public and debt/equity exposures: direct property, mortgages/whole loans, private funds, REITs/REOCs, MBS/CMBS and listed securities. Commercial-property types include office, retail, industrial, multifamily and specialized categor... / N0373: Marie note summarizes office, retail, industrial, multifamily and specialized property demand drivers, lease structures, location sensitivity and cyclical exposure. Preserved as practical property-type comparison.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Appraisal value를 frictionless market price로 해석

formulas: Value depends on expected property cash flows and required return/capitalization rate

quiz.question: Real estate comparables adjustment가 중요한 이유는?
quiz.explanation: Location/quality/leases가 달라.

quiz.question: Private appraisal returns의 잠재적 특징은?
quiz.explanation: Appraisal process가 market moves를 늦게 반영할 수 있어.

losItems.label: LOS 31.b
losItems.title: Economic value drivers and portfolio role of real estate
losItems.losText: explain economic value drivers of real estate investments and their role in a portfolio
losItems.why: Demand-supply drivers를 NOI와 cap rate 양쪽에 연결하고 income, appreciation, inflation hedge, diversification을 조건부로 해석해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: explain economic value drivers of real estate investments and their role in a portfolio

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Property value는 rent/occupancy가 만드는 NOI와 investors required return/cap rate의 조합이야. Economic growth가 rent를 올려도 rates/cap rates가 더 오르면 value가 떨어질 수 있어.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Drivers: demographics, employment, household income, retail spending, trade/logistics, business formation, new construction, land constraints, interest rates, credit availability and investor capital flows. Portfolio role includes current income, capital appreciation, possible inflation linkage, diversification and tax characteristics, but appraisal smoothing can overstate diversification.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0370: Reasons include current income, capital appreciation, inflation hedge, diversification and tax benefits. Discusses low/moderate correlation with traditional assets, possible inflation sensitivity and return drivers. bullets: Low appraisal correlation=true low economic risk
NOI growth and cap-rate compression double count

quiz.question: NOI 상승과 cap rate 상승이 동시에 발생하면 value는?
quiz.explanation: Numerator와 required return effects가 반대.

quiz.question: Appraisal-based low correlation 해석 시 주의점은?
quiz.explanation: Measured correlation이 낮아 보일 수 있어.

losItems.label: LOS 31.c
losItems.title: Distinctive characteristics of commercial property types
losItems.losText: discuss the distinctive investment characteristics of commercial property types
losItems.why: Office, retail, industrial, multifamily, hotel 등은 demand driver와 lease duration, operating leverage가 달라 동일 cap-rate intuition을 적용하면 안 돼.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: discuss the distinctive investment characteristics of commercial property types

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Office는 employment and business activity, retail은 consumer spending and tenant mix, industrial/logistics는 trade/e-commerce, multifamily는 household formation and housing affordability, hotel은 daily repricing and travel demand에 민감해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Lease length, tenant improvements, capex, expense pass-through, occupancy volatility and development lead time vary by type. Hotels have short-duration “leases” and high operating leverage; office often long leases but rollover/tenant-improvement risk; industrial may have simpler spaces; multifamily diversified tenants but regulation; retail depends on anchor/traffic and e-commerce.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0371: Covers leverage, operational/management risk, lease risk, environmental/obsolescence risk, market/demand-supply risk, valuation uncertainty, illiquidity, regulatory/tax and interest-rate risk. Retained for audit traceability.

bullets: 모든 commercial property를 long lease로 묶음

formulas: Property-type analysis is mainly driver and cash-flow structure comparison

quiz.question: Daily room repricing으로 cycle sensitivity가 큰 type은?
quiz.explanation: Short booking horizon과 operating leverage가 큼.

quiz.question: Office 투자에서 중요한 risk는?
choices: Lease rollover and tenant improvement costs
quiz.explanation: Large tenants와 re-leasing costs가 중요.

losItems.label: LOS 31.d
losItems.title: Real estate due diligence and valuation approaches
losItems.losText: explain the due diligence process and valuation approaches for real estate investments
losItems.why: Physical/legal/financial/market due diligence를 valuation assumptions와 연결하고 cost, sales comparison, income approaches를 구분해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: explain the due diligence process and valuation approaches for real estate investments

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: 좋은 model도 title problem, environmental liability, weak tenant, deferred maintenance를 놓치면 의미 없어. Due diligence는 forecast inputs가 현실적인지 확인하는 과정이야.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Physical inspection, engineering, environmental, title/zoning, lease and tenant-credit review, historical operating statements, financing, tax/legal, market demand-supply를 검토해. Valuation: cost approach=land+replacement/reproduction cost−depreciation; sales comparison=adjusted comparables; income approach=direct capitalization or DCF. DCF forecasts NOI and terminal/reversion value.

sections.title: 4. 계산·판단 workflow
bullets: Sensitivity on rent, vacancy, cap rate

Valuation overview introduces cost, sales-comparison and income approaches; income approach includes direct capitalization and DCF. Attached notes s...

bullets: Terminal cap rate와 discount rate 동일시

quiz.question: Direct capitalization에서 numerator는 보통?
quiz.explanation: Property-level NOI를 cap rate로 자본화.

quiz.question: Title/zoning review는 어떤 due diligence?
quiz.explanation: Ownership and permitted use를 검증.

losItems.label: LOS 31.e
losItems.title: Real estate indexes: construction and biases
losItems.losText: discuss real estate investment indexes, including their construction and potential biases
losItems.why: Appraisal-based, transaction-based, public securities indexes가 서로 다른 risks와 measurement biases를 가진다는 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: discuss real estate investment indexes, including their construction and potential biases

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Private properties는 매일 거래되지 않아서 index가 actual transactions 대신 periodic appraisals를 쓸 수 있어. 이 때문에 returns가 smooth하고 market turning points에 lag할 수 있어.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Appraisal-based indexes use assessed property values and may suffer smoothing/stale appraisal. Transaction-based indexes use repeat sales or hedonic controls but sample selection and changing property mix matter. Public REIT indexes are liquid, timely and investable but include equity-market leverage/sentiment and are not pure private-property returns. Index weighting and geography/type coverage also matter.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0388: Due diligence covers property, legal, financial, lease/tenant, environmental, market and operational review. Valuation overview introduces cost, sales-comparison and income approaches; income approach includes direct capitalization and DCF. Attached notes s... / N0391: Cost approach = land value + replacement/reproduction cost − depreciation/obsolescence. Sales comparison adjusts comparable transaction prices. Income/direct-cap method V=NOI/cap rate. DCF forecasts periodic NOI and terminal/reversion value. Notes compare s...

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Low appraisal volatility를 true low risk로 해석
Different index returns를 direct comparison without methodology

formulas: Observed appraisal volatility/correlation may be downward biased by smoothing

quiz.question: Appraisal-based index의 대표 bias는?
quiz.explanation: Periodic appraisals가 market movement를 늦게 반영.

quiz.question: Public REIT index의 장점은?
quiz.explanation: Real-time investable pricing이 장점.

readings.title: Investments in Real Estate Through Publicly Traded Securities
readings.sourceNote: 2026 Schweser R32 backbone + Marie note ledger N0392~N0400 integrated and independently rewritten.
readings.overview: Public real-estate vehicle types에서 시작해 NAVPS, FFO/AFFO, NAV·multiple·DCF valuation과 public-vs-private trade-offs를 연결한다.
readings.examPriority: 매우 높음. NOI/cap rate NAVPS, FFO/AFFO adjustments, forward multiples와 leverage comparison이 핵심이다.

losItems.label: LOS 32.a
losItems.title: Types of publicly traded real estate securities
losItems.losText: discuss types of publicly traded real estate securities
losItems.why: REIT, REOC, mortgage REIT와 listed debt-like exposures를 구분하고 cash-flow source와 leverage를 봐야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: discuss types of publicly traded real estate securities

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Public real-estate securities는 property를 직접 사는 대신 listed vehicle의 shares/debt를 사는 방식이야. Liquidity와 divisibility는 높지만 equity-market sentiment와 governance risk가 추가돼.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Equity REITs own/operate income-producing property; mortgage REITs invest in real-estate debt/MBS and are more rate/funding sensitive; hybrid structures combine exposures. REOCs are operating companies without all REIT tax/distribution constraints and may retain more earnings for development. Public real-estate debt securities include mortgage-backed exposures and corporate debt of property companies.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0392: Introduces publicly traded real-estate securities, REITs and REOCs, legal/operating structures and equity versus mortgage exposures. Public vehicles offer liquidity and diversification but add stock-market volatility, governance and public-company costs. / N0393: Continues REIT/REOC types and structures, including equity/mortgage/hybrid and operating-property exposures. Notes tax/distribution features, management structures, leverage and listed-market behavior. / N0394: Covers qualifying income/assets/distribution rules, pass-through tax treatment and distinctions among REIT structures and REOCs. Notes investor liquidity, forced distributions, governance and structural conflicts. / N0395: Marie summary of REIT qualification/distribution, equity versus mortgage REIT, UPREIT/DOWNREIT structure, FFO/AFFO adjustments, leverage and market risks. Includes why GAAP net income/depreciation is a poor standalone measure for property companies.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Mortgage REIT를 low-rate-risk equity REIT처럼 분석

formulas: Public vehicle value still depends on underlying asset cash flows, leverage and market pricing

quiz.question: Mortgage REIT의 핵심 asset exposure는?
quiz.explanation: Debt and spread/funding risk가 핵심.

quiz.question: REOC가 REIT와 다를 수 있는 점은?
quiz.explanation: REIT-specific distribution/tax constraints가 다를 수 있어.

losItems.label: LOS 32.b
losItems.title: NAVPS valuation of publicly traded real estate securities
losItems.losText: justify the use of net asset value per share (NAVPS) in valuation of publicly traded real estate securities and estimate NAVPS based on forecasted cash net operating income
losItems.why: Property companies의 accounting book value보다 current property market value를 반영하기 위해 NAVPS를 쓰는 이유와 계산 순서를 잡는 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: justify the use of net asset value per share (NAVPS) in valuation of publicly traded real estate securities and estimate NAVPS based on forecasted cash net operating income

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: REIT의 assets는 개별 properties이므로 각 property NOI를 market cap rate로 자본화해 gross asset value를 만들고, debt와 other liabilities를 빼 equity NAV를 구할 수 있어.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Forecast cash NOI를 stabilized/forward basis로 estimate하고 appropriate market cap rate를 적용해 property value를 산출해. Cash/nonoperating assets를 더하고 debt/preferred/other liabilities를 차감한 뒤 diluted shares로 나눠 NAVPS. Market price와 NAVPS premium/discount를 비교하되 cap-rate assumptions에 매우 민감해.

sections.title: 4. 계산·판단 workflow
bullets: Select market cap rate by property/market

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0392: Introduces publicly traded real-estate securities, REITs and REOCs, legal/operating structures and equity versus mortgage exposures. Public vehicles offer liquidity and diversification but add stock-market volatility, governance and public-company costs. / N0393: Continues REIT/REOC types and structures, including equity/mortgage/hybrid and operating-property exposures. Notes tax/distribution features, management structures, leverage and listed-market behavior. / N0394: Covers qualifying income/assets/distribution rules, pass-through tax treatment and distinctions among REIT structures and REOCs. Notes investor liquidity, forced distributions, governance and structural conflicts. / N0395: Marie summary of REIT qualification/distribution, equity versus mortgage REIT, UPREIT/DOWNREIT structure, FFO/AFFO adjustments, leverage and market risks. Includes why GAAP net income/depreciation is a poor standalone measure for property companies.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Trailing NOI와 forward cap rate mismatch
Company-wide one cap rate without property mix

formulas: Property value≈Forecast cash NOI/Market cap rate

quiz.question: Forecast NOI 10, cap rate 5%면 property value는?
NAVPS 계산에서 debt는?
quiz.explanation: Asset value에서 liabilities를 빼.

losItems.label: LOS 32.c
losItems.title: FFO and AFFO in REIT valuation
losItems.losText: describe the use of funds from operations (FFO) and adjusted funds from operations (AFFO) in REIT valuation
losItems.why: Property depreciation 때문에 GAAP net income이 ongoing economics를 왜곡할 수 있어 FFO/AFFO를 쓰는 이유를 이해해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe the use of funds from operations (FFO) and adjusted funds from operations (AFFO) in REIT valuation

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Buildings may economically appreciate even while accounting depreciation reduces NI. FFO reverses certain real-estate depreciation/amortization and removes gains on property sales to focus recurring operations.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Typical FFO starts from net income, adds back real estate depreciation/amortization, subtracts gains on property sales (and adjusts noncontrolling interests as applicable). AFFO further adjusts straight-line rent and recurring maintenance capex to approximate sustainable cash available. Definitions can vary by analyst/company, so comparability needs care.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0395: Marie summary of REIT qualification/distribution, equity versus mortgage REIT, UPREIT/DOWNREIT structure, FFO/AFFO adjustments, leverage and market risks. Includes why GAAP net income/depreciation is a poor standalone measure for property companies. / N0396: Drawbacks include lack of direct control, public-company costs, stock-market volatility, structural conflicts, forced equity issuance/limited retained earnings and lower direct-property diversification. NAV valuation: estimate market cap rate from comparabl... / N0397: Advantages include liquidity, transparency, professional management, divisibility and easier diversification; disadvantages include equity-market co-movement, leverage/management risk, structural conflicts and less control than direct ownership. Compares RE... / N0399: Continues FFO/AFFO definitions, growth and payout/coverage analysis, NAV premiums/discounts and relative-multiple interpretation. Emphasizes nonrecurring items, maintenance capex and noncash rent adjustments.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: All depreciation add-back including unrelated assets
Property sale gain을 recurring earnings로 유지

formulas: FFO≈NI+Real estate D&A−Gains on property sales
AFFO≈FFO−Recurring maintenance capex−Selected noncash rent adjustments

quiz.question: FFO에서 property sale gain은 일반적으로?
quiz.explanation: Nonrecurring disposal gain을 제거.

quiz.question: AFFO가 FFO보다 추가로 중시하는 것은?
quiz.explanation: Sustainable cash generation에 가까워지려는 조정.

losItems.label: LOS 32.d
losItems.title: Valuing a REIT share with NAV, relative value and DCF
losItems.losText: calculate and interpret the value of a REIT share using the net asset value, relative value (price-to-FFO and price-to-AFFO), and discounted cash flow approaches
losItems.why: 하나의 method만 쓰지 않고 asset value, earnings multiple, cash-flow valuation을 triangulate하는 계산 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: calculate and interpret the value of a REIT share using the net asset value, relative value (price-to-FFO and price-to-AFFO), and discounted cash flow approaches

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: NAV는 underlying properties market value에 강하고, P/FFO·P/AFFO는 peer relative pricing에 강하며, DCF는 future cash-flow growth와 terminal assumptions를 직접 모델링해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: NAVPS는 LOS 32.b. Relative value는 forecast FFO/AFFO per share × justified/comparable multiple. DCF may discount dividends or FCFE-like distributable cash flows plus terminal value. Premium/discount to NAV can reflect management quality, growth pipeline, leverage, liquidity and market sentiment rather than simple mispricing.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0396: Drawbacks include lack of direct control, public-company costs, stock-market volatility, structural conflicts, forced equity issuance/limited retained earnings and lower direct-property diversification. NAV valuation: estimate market cap rate from comparabl... / N0398: NAV approach capitalizes estimated cash NOI and adjusts cash/receivables, debt and other liabilities before dividing by shares. P/FFO approach uses FFO/share × sector multiple. AFFO subtracts noncash rent and recurring maintenance capex from FFO, then appli... / N0399: Continues FFO/AFFO definitions, growth and payout/coverage analysis, NAV premiums/discounts and relative-multiple interpretation. Emphasizes nonrecurring items, maintenance capex and noncash rent adjustments. / N0400: Near-identical alternate capture of the same REIT metrics/valuation page integrated through N0399. Retained as duplicate evidence.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Trailing metric with forward peer multiple mismatch
NAV cap rate and DCF discount rate mixed

quiz.question: AFFO/share 2.0, justified P/AFFO 18×면 value estimate는?
NAV premium이 항상 mispricing은 아닌 이유는?
quiz.explanation: Public vehicle-specific value drivers가 있어.

losItems.label: LOS 32.e
losItems.title: Public real estate securities versus private vehicles
losItems.losText: explain advantages and disadvantages of investing in real estate through publicly traded securities compared to private vehicles
losItems.why: Public liquidity·transparency와 private control·direct property exposure의 trade-off를 portfolio 관점에서 설명해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: explain advantages and disadvantages of investing in real estate through publicly traded securities compared to private vehicles

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: REIT share는 작은 금액으로 diversified property exposure를 사고팔 수 있지만 stock-market beta와 management/governance를 함께 산다. Direct/private vehicle은 control과 asset selection이 크지만 illiquidity와 transaction burden이 높아.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Public advantages: liquidity, price discovery, divisibility, transparency, professional management, diversification. Disadvantages: public-market volatility, correlation with equities, no direct control, management agency costs, forced distribution/capital-market dependence, leverage/structural complexity. Private advantages: control, tailored leverage/strategy, direct asset exposure; disadvantages: illiquidity, large ticket, appraisal uncertainty, high due diligence and transaction costs.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0396: Drawbacks include lack of direct control, public-company costs, stock-market volatility, structural conflicts, forced equity issuance/limited retained earnings and lower direct-property diversification. NAV valuation: estimate market cap rate from comparabl... / N0398: NAV approach capitalizes estimated cash NOI and adjusts cash/receivables, debt and other liabilities before dividing by shares. P/FFO approach uses FFO/share × sector multiple. AFFO subtracts noncash rent and recurring maintenance capex from FFO, then appli... / N0399: Continues FFO/AFFO definitions, growth and payout/coverage analysis, NAV premiums/discounts and relative-multiple interpretation. Emphasizes nonrecurring items, maintenance capex and noncash rent adjustments. / N0400: Near-identical alternate capture of the same REIT metrics/valuation page integrated through N0399. Retained as duplicate evidence.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Public security volatility=underlying property volatility only

formulas: Compare total economic exposure, not only observed return volatility

quiz.question: Public REIT의 대표 장점은?
quiz.explanation: Listed shares로 쉽게 거래.

quiz.question: Private vehicle의 observed low volatility 해석 시 주의점은?
quiz.explanation: Measured volatility가 understated일 수 있어.

readings.title: Hedge Fund Strategies
readings.sourceNote: 2026 Schweser R33 backbone + Marie note ledger N0401~N0438 integrated and independently rewritten.
readings.overview: Strategy classification에서 equity/event/relative-value, macro/managed-futures, specialist and multi-manager strategies를 비교하고 factor-model risk decomposition과 traditional portfolio allocation impact까지 연결한다.
readings.examPriority: 높음. Strategy mechanics, hidden leverage/tail risk, factor exposure와 portfolio-level diversification을 분리해서 봐야 한다.

losItems.label: LOS 33.a
losItems.title: Classification of hedge fund strategies
losItems.losText: discuss how hedge fund strategies may be classified
losItems.why: Hedge fund를 legal form 하나로 보지 말고 return engine과 primary risk exposure로 분류하는 LOS야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: discuss how hedge fund strategies may be classified

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: 같은 “hedge fund”라도 equity beta, event risk, convergence risk, macro direction, volatility selling, manager allocation 등 수익원이 완전히 달라. Strategy classification은 due diligence와 portfolio fit의 출발점이야.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Broad families include equity-related, event-driven, relative value, opportunistic, specialist and multi-manager. Classification is imperfect because funds can combine styles and shift exposures over time. Therefore label보다 actual positions, gross/net exposure, leverage, liquidity and factor betas를 확인해야 해.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0401: Six categories: equity, event-driven, relative value, opportunistic, specialist and multi-manager. Equity strategies include long/short, dedicated short/short-biased and equity market neutral. Notes leverage, lockups, legal flexibility, opacity and fee stru... / N0402: Overview page maps six major strategy families and characteristic return drivers: stock selection, corporate events, relative mispricing, macro/opportunistic views, specialist niches and multi-manager allocation. Preserves hedge-fund feature/constraint note.

sections.title: 6. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Different strategies의 Sharpe를 liquidity/tail risk 무시하고 비교

formulas: Classification is qualitative; verify with holdings and factor exposures

quiz.question: Strategy classification의 가장 좋은 기준은?
choices: Primary return engine and risk exposure
quiz.explanation: 실제 economics를 봐야 해.

quiz.question: Multi-style fund에서 label만으로 부족한 이유는?
quiz.explanation: Dynamic allocation이 가능해.

losItems.label: LOS 33.b
losItems.title: Equity-related hedge fund strategies
losItems.losText: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of equity-related hedge fund strategies
losItems.why: Long/short equity, dedicated short, equity market neutral의 net/gross exposure와 portfolio role을 비교해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of equity-related hedge fund strategies

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Long/short는 undervalued longs와 overvalued shorts를 함께 두지만 net beta가 남을 수 있어. Dedicated short는 structural negative market exposure, EMN은 matched longs/shorts로 beta를 최소화하고 stock-selection alpha를 노려.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Implementation uses fundamental/quantitative selection, sector/beta neutrality, securities borrowing and leverage. Long/short can reduce beta vs long-only but still equity-correlated. Dedicated short can diversify crashes but has borrow/squeeze and positive-market headwinds. EMN seeks low beta but gross leverage, model crowding and correlation breakdown risk가 있어.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0401: Six categories: equity, event-driven, relative value, opportunistic, specialist and multi-manager. Equity strategies include long/short, dedicated short/short-biased and equity market neutral. Dedicated short/short-biased targets overvalued/deteriorating firms, often negative market correlation and high volatility.
