Includes activist short-selling and borrow/squeeze risk. / N0405: Continuation clarifies dedicated short often 60–120% short while short-biased retains smaller net short exposure; both can diversify traditional long portfolios but face borrow/squeeze and positive-market-return headwinds. EMN combines long and short positi...

quiz.question: Long 130%, short 80%면 net exposure는?
EMN의 목표는?
choices: Low market beta with relative alpha
quiz.explanation: Matched long-short structure.

losItems.label: LOS 33.c
losItems.title: Event-driven hedge fund strategies
losItems.losText: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of event-driven hedge fund strategies
losItems.why: Merger arbitrage와 distressed의 catalyst, left-tail, liquidity 특성을 구분해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of event-driven hedge fund strategies

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Event-driven은 corporate event가 가격 gap을 닫는 catalyst가 되는 전략이야. Merger arb는 deal completion spread, distressed는 restructuring/recovery value를 trade해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Cash merger: long target. Stock deal: often long target, short acquirer according to exchange ratio. Return is deal spread but break risk creates asymmetric loss. Distressed managers analyze capital structure, legal process and recovery, may seek creditor control. Event strategies can diversify broad beta but hidden market/credit exposure rises in stress.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0409: Event-driven strategies profit from corporate events and include merger arbitrage, distressed securities and other event situations. Returns often have significant left-tail/event risk, idiosyncratic catalysts and lower dependence on broad market direction ... / N0410: Merger arbitrage buys target and may short acquirer in stock deals; spread compensates for deal-failure/uncertainty risk and leverage is common. choices: Long target, short acquirer based on exchange ratio
quiz.explanation: Deal-value exposure를 hedge.

quiz.question: Merger arb의 대표 tail risk는?
quiz.explanation: Failure 시 target price 급락 가능.

losItems.label: LOS 33.d
losItems.title: Relative value hedge fund strategies
losItems.losText: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of relative value hedge fund strategies
losItems.why: Cheap vs rich related securities의 convergence를 trade하지만 leverage와 funding risk 때문에 market neutral이 곧 low risk는 아니야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of relative value hedge fund strategies

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Fixed-income arbitrage, convertible arbitrage 등은 related claims의 price relationship이 정상화될 것을 기대해 long cheap/short rich positions를 만든다.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Fixed-income arb trades curve, spread, basis or capital-structure discrepancies, often highly leveraged because expected spreads are small. Convertible arb often long convertible and short underlying stock using delta hedge, earning from volatility/credit/carry mispricing. Risks: convergence failure, model error, funding liquidity, short borrow, crowded unwind.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합

choices: Long cheap, short rich related assets
quiz.explanation: Relative mispricing convergence를 노려.

quiz.question: Small expected spread trades가 leverage를 쓰는 이유와 risk는?
choices: Return scale but funding/unwind risk 증가
quiz.explanation: Leverage가 tail loss를 키울 수 있어.

losItems.label: LOS 33.e
losItems.title: Opportunistic hedge fund strategies
losItems.losText: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of opportunistic hedge fund strategies
losItems.why: Global macro와 managed futures처럼 broad markets에서 regime/trend를 trade하는 strategies를 이해해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of opportunistic hedge fund strategies

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Opportunistic managers는 country, rates, FX, equity index, commodities across markets에서 큰 dislocations나 trends를 찾아 directional/relative positions를 취해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Global macro can be discretionary or systematic and uses top-down growth/inflation/policy views. Managed futures/CTAs often use systematic trend-following across liquid futures. They can deliver crisis diversification when sustained trends emerge, but choppy reversals create whipsaw. Leverage and derivatives make notional exposure large.

sections.title: 5. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0414: Covers global macro/opportunistic directional strategies, specialist sector/niche strategies and multi-manager platforms. Discusses systematic versus discretionary approaches, leverage, liquidity, capacity, manager selection and portfolio role. Managed futures/CTA strategies use liquid futures and rules-based signals, co...

quiz.question: Managed futures가 거래하는 대표 instruments는?
quiz.explanation: Rates/FX/equity/commodity futures.

quiz.question: Trend-following의 대표 위험은?
quiz.explanation: Choppy markets can cause repeated losses.

losItems.label: LOS 33.f
losItems.title: Specialist hedge fund strategies
losItems.losText: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of specialist hedge fund strategies
losItems.why: Volatility, reinsurance, life settlements처럼 niche risk premia와 model risk를 다루는 전략이야.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of specialist hedge fund strategies

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Specialist strategies는 broad market direction보다 특정 market microstructure, insurance risk, longevity, volatility surface 같은 전문 영역에서 수익을 찾아.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Volatility trading compares implied vs expected/realized vol via options, variance instruments, dispersion etc. Reinsurance/ILS earns premium for catastrophe risk with low normal-market correlation but severe tail risk. Life settlements buy policies, pay future premiums and receive death benefit; return depends on longevity estimates and funding/liquidity.

losItems.label: LOS 33.g
losItems.title: Multi-manager hedge fund strategies
losItems.losText: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of multi-manager hedge fund strategies
losItems.why: Fund of funds와 multi-strategy platform의 diversification, fee layer, liquidity and governance 차이를 비교해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: discuss investment characteristics, strategy implementation, and role in a portfolio of multi-manager hedge fund strategies

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Investor는 직접 single strategy를 선택하는 대신 multiple managers/teams에 capital을 배분해 idiosyncratic manager risk를 줄이려 해.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Fund of funds allocates to external hedge funds, offering access and due diligence but double fees, opacity and liquidity mismatch. Multi-strategy platforms allocate internally among pods/teams with centralized risk limits and dynamic capital, but operational complexity, crowding and talent dependency가 커. Diversification benefit depends on true exposure independence.

losItems.label: LOS 33.h
losItems.title: Using factor models to understand hedge fund risk exposures
losItems.losText: describe how factor models may be used to understand hedge fund risk exposures
losItems.why: Low simple beta가 실제로는 dynamic nonlinear factor exposures를 숨길 수 있어서 regression을 제대로 해석해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: describe how factor models may be used to understand hedge fund risk exposures

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Hedge fund returns를 equity, rates, credit, FX, volatility, trend, liquidity factors에 regress하면 strategy label 밖의 hidden betas를 추정할 수 있어.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Linear factor model R_HF=α+Σβ_kF_k+ε. Conditional models allow betas to vary with state variables; nonlinear option-like exposures may require squared terms, lookback/trend factors or regime analysis. Stepwise selection can help but data mining and multicollinearity risk가 있어. Smoothed illiquid returns can bias betas downward.

losItems.label: LOS 33.i
losItems.title: Impact of hedge fund allocation in a traditional portfolio
losItems.losText: evaluate the impact of an allocation to a hedge fund strategy in a traditional investment portfolio
losItems.why: Standalone Sharpe가 아니라 correlation, drawdown, liquidity, tail risk와 portfolio-level marginal effect를 평가해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: evaluate the impact of an allocation to a hedge fund strategy in a traditional investment portfolio

sections.title: 2. Intuition
sections.body: Hedge fund allocation이 기대수익을 조금 높이거나 volatility를 낮춰도 lockup, left-tail, fees, factor crowding을 추가할 수 있어. 핵심은 기존 portfolio와 어떻게 상호작용하는지야.

sections.title: 3. Technical explanation
sections.body: Use expected returns, volatilities, correlations and risk measures to recompute portfolio outcomes. Market-neutral, managed futures, macro, merger arb 등은 different diversification profiles. Non-normal returns require drawdown, downside deviation, expected shortfall and liquidity analysis beyond mean-variance. Sharpe vs Sortino rankings can differ.
